ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_number" INTEGER /* Experiment number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question or hypothesis being tested */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Experimental design used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  "researcher_in_charge" INTEGER /* Researcher-in-charge of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_in_charge FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_in_charge") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the plot belongs to */,
  "plot_number" INTEGER /* Plot number within the experiment */,
  "plot_side" TEXT /* Side of the plot (L for lower left, R for upper right) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the plot */,
  "plot_size" TEXT /* Size of the plot in square meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type or classification for the plot */,
  "crop_species" TEXT /* Crop or plant species being grown in the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_plot_side FOREIGN KEY ("plot_side") REFERENCES plot_sides ("side_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the sample was taken from */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was taken */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample taken (e.g., soil, plant, water) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sample */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Sampling method used */,
  "sample_size" TEXT /* Sample size or quantity collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the sample */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_type FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type") REFERENCES sample_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_sides" (
  "side_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot side */,
  "side_name" TEXT /* Name of the plot side (e.g., L for lower left, R for upper right) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plot side */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("side_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type (e.g., soil, plant, water) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or position of the researcher */,
  "area_of_expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise or specialization of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_researchers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "researcher_id")
)
column_names: Research question or hypothesis being tested

Type of sample taken (e.g., soil, plant, water)

Name of the sample type (e.g., soil, plant, water)
